profile.name: Fran Rom
profile.title: Senior / Lead Frontend Engineer | Web3 & AI
profile.summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 8+ years of experience building production Web3 products, leading engineering teams, and integrating AI into real applications. Comfortable owning the full stack when needed: from onchain dapp architecture to backend services and deployments. Experienced shipping AI-powered features including LLM interfaces, autonomous agents, and agentic workflows in production. Web3 is my background, but the problems I want to solve are not limited to it.

experience.description: Led frontend engineering for a Web3 gaming platform, building tools and dapps for game developers, with full-stack and DevOps ownership when needed.
highlights: Led a team of 3 frontend engineers to design and ship a multi-tenant questing platform with NFTs and a progression system, migrating the architecture from PaaS to SaaS with auth, billing integration, and full tenant isolation
Architected and built Web3 tooling with Next.js, Vite, wagmi, and viem: onchain dashboards, game developer SDKs, and dapp prototypes across EVM chains
Built 2 real-time games driven by live market data, consuming high-frequency WebSocket price feeds and managing low-latency state updates on the frontend
Integrated LLM-powered features into production dapps: natural language interfaces, AI agents for in-app action execution, automated branding generation, and layout building via chat
Took full-stack ownership when needed, building and maintaining Node.js services and APIs to support dapp features without blocking frontend delivery
Managed CI/CD pipelines and production deployments across the company's frontend projects using Cloudflare

experience.description: Built Web3 platforms and prototypes within the R&D team of a leading crypto media company.
highlights: Built a Web3 jobs platform with CMS connecting blockchain companies with talent, using React, Remix, Strapi, and Ethereum
Developed an education platform with an NFT-gated access system as part of the R&D team, taking it from prototype to stakeholder review
Created Web3-based prototypes to validate product concepts and inform the direction of new features across the organisation

experience.description: Built the full Web3 frontend for a live NFT marketplace spanning 3 games on EVM and Solana, alongside multi-chain dapps including game launchers, dashboards, and a Web3 launchpad.
highlights: Built the full Web3 frontend for a live NFT marketplace spanning 3 games, supporting EVM and Solana collections using wagmi, ethers.js, and Infura
Implemented staking and farming features within the same product, enabling real users to interact with DeFi mechanics across multiple game ecosystems
Built a game launcher embedded with Electron and game dashboards for managing tokens and NFTs across EVM and Solana
Developed a Web3 launchpad with multi-chain wallet connections
NFT collection minting interfaces on both EVM and Solana
Handled multi-chain wallet connections across all products

experience.description: Built DeFi platform interfaces with blockchain data integration for the Defi.finance v2 platform.
highlights: Built a custom Subgraph from scratch to index blockchain data, enabling real-time onchain queries for the Defi.finance v2 platform
Led the frontend integration of new smart contracts, including wallet authentication and the Web3 connection layer, using React, TypeScript, and The Graph

experience.description: Sole frontend engineer leading development for a DAO building Yield DeFi platforms. Reached $1M in Total Value Locked on mainnet.
highlights: Sole frontend engineer on two Yield DeFi platforms for a DAO, built on Pancakeswap and Beefy standards, taking both from zero to mainnet launch
Reached $1M TVL at peak, validating the platforms' adoption and reliability among real DeFi users
Ran the project for 2 years as frontend lead and DAO contributor
Hands-on with smart contract interaction, staking mechanics, and yield strategies

experience.description: Built the game UI layer for a top-ranked global kids education app, integrating Unity-based games into the React Native mobile experience.
highlights: Built the game UI layer for a top-ranked global kids education app: player progression, achievements, and game interfaces with React Native, integrating Unity-based games into the mobile experience
Owned the App Store and Play Store release process, ensuring smooth cross-platform delivery across iOS and Android
Collaborated with UX and design to build a shared Storybook component library, improving consistency across the app's 1,600+ interactive activities
Feature, performance, polishing, and bug ownership across the mobile experience
Built React Native animations and ensured cross-platform optimization for mobile phones

experience.description: Developed and maintained the frontend for a large-scale rental platform operating across Europe, within a team of 50+ engineers.
highlights: Developed and maintained listings and booking flow features for a large-scale rental platform operating across Europe, within a team of 50+ engineers using React, GraphQL, and Apollo Client
Built and maintained a shared Storybook component library and increased frontend reliability through Jest and Enzyme test coverage
Agile SCRUM methodology

experience.description: Founded and ran a web design studio in London, delivering 30+ projects for small businesses and agencies end to end.
highlights: Founded and ran a web design studio delivering 30+ projects for small businesses and agencies, handling client relationships, UX/UI design, and technical execution end to end
UX/UI design for all kinds of websites
Producing products that are user-friendly, effective, and appealing
Custom content management systems on demand

projects.name: CV Bot
projects.description: AI chatbot that showcases developer experience via LLM tool-calling. Open source and forkable.
highlights: Built with React + TypeScript + Vercel AI SDK
Configurable LLM provider and tone
Tool-calling architecture for structured data retrieval

projects.name: Ballena.io DeFi Platform
projects.description: Two Yield DeFi projects built for a DAO, based on Beefy and Pancakeswap standards. Successfully deployed to mainnet.
highlights: Led frontend development for two DeFi yield projects
Used coding standards from Pancakeswap and Beefy
Successfully deployed to mainnet

projects.name: Game7 Questing Platform
projects.description: Multitenant questing platform with NFTs and progression system, evolved from PaaS to SaaS.
highlights: Built auth layer, billing integration, and tenant isolation
Led team of 3 frontend engineers
Integrated AI-powered features including natural language interfaces and agents

education.details: Claude API, Claude Code in Action, Agentic AI, AI Fluency Framework & Foundations
Solidity (Beginner to Advanced), Chainlink Oracles, cross-chain development
JavaScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Angular, HTML/CSS

cryptoExperience.summary: Active crypto user since 2017. Started by buying first tokens and exploring the technology, then went deep — co-creating a DeFi yield platform for a DAO that reached $1M TVL on mainnet. Uses a Trezor hardware wallet for long-term holdings since 2020. Regularly bridges assets cross-chain and believes interoperability is one of the most important challenges in the blockchain space.
activities: Co-created Ballena.io DeFi platform reaching $1M TVL (2020-2022)
Uses Trezor hardware wallet since 2020 for long-term self-custody
Regularly bridges assets cross-chain (Across Protocol and similar bridges)
Has staked, farmed, and provided liquidity on multiple chains
Built NFT collections, staking UIs, and farming interfaces professionally
opinions: Interoperability and cross-chain bridging are essential for blockchain adoption
Self-custody is non-negotiable — hardware wallets are the gold standard for securing assets
Good wallet UX matters enormously — most wallets still make simple tasks feel complex
EVM and Solana are fundamentally different: EVM's account model vs Solana's program model changes how you think about state, transactions, and wallet interactions
Open source is the backbone of crypto — trust requires transparency
